title: aira multiculmis
intro: Aira multiculmis, also known as Hairawn's oatgrass or Hairawn's oat grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aira multiculmis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Aira multiculmis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
